clinicalfair 0.1.1
  • Reference
    • Algorithmic fairness assessment with clinicalfair
  • Changelog

Package index

Data Preparation

Functions for preparing fairness data objects.

fairness_data()
Create a fairness evaluation data object

Fairness Metrics

Compute and evaluate group-wise fairness metrics.

fairness_metrics()
Compute fairness metrics across groups
intersectional_fairness()
Compute intersectional fairness metrics

Visualization

Plot calibration curves, ROC curves, and fairness disparities.

plot_calibration()
Plot calibration curves by group
plot_roc()
Plot ROC curves by group
reexports autoplot
Objects exported from other packages

Mitigation

Threshold-based fairness mitigation.

threshold_optimize()
Optimize thresholds for fairness

Reporting

Generate audit reports.

fairness_report()
Generate a fairness summary report

Other

autoplot(<fairness_metrics>)
Plot fairness metrics disparity
compas_sim
Simulated COMPAS-like recidivism prediction data
fairness_data()
Create a fairness evaluation data object
fairness_metrics()
Compute fairness metrics across groups
fairness_report()
Generate a fairness summary report
intersectional_fairness()
Compute intersectional fairness metrics
plot_calibration()
Plot calibration curves by group
plot_roc()
Plot ROC curves by group
threshold_optimize()
Optimize thresholds for fairness
